narrative:
Raccoon Twp (precinct in Gallia County) has 669 registered voters, with 55.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.2 percentage points.
